response.justification: The candidate is an accomplished full-stack engineer with strong distributed systems and infrastructure experience, but critically fails the minimum C++ requirement—showing only ~6 months of professional C++ experience versus the required 8 years. While their leadership, mentoring, and cloud/Kubernetes knowledge are valuable, this is a C++-focused cloud platform role requiring deep systems-level expertise in that language. The career trajectory (web, mobile, tooling) rather than systems programming indicates this is not the right fit.
strengths: Proven distributed systems expertise at scale (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/second, low-latency infrastructure)
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, mentoring, and multiple staff-level roles across organizations
Strong modern DevOps and cloud knowledge (Kubernetes, AWS CDK, Docker, microservices architecture)
concerns: Critical gap: Only ~6 months professional C++ experience vs. 8 years minimum required; no evidence of sustained C++ expertise
Career arc is web/mobile/tooling-focused, not systems or hardware-level infrastructure aligned with cloud compute platform needs
No demonstrated production cloud architecture experience balancing long-term platform strategy with immediate engineering needs
